data.body: [E1] Native-disable (has_pull_requests:false) — REJECTED. Verified via GitHub API that has_pull_requests exists and is settable on navapbc/rebar (currently true; the Feb-2026 native setting is real). Fork-side UX of setting it false: the 'Contribute'/'New pull request' affordance is removed and a would-be contributor hits a silent dead-end with NO redirect to Gerrit. Rejected in favor of PRs-enabled + welcome-bot, which converts drive-bys instead of walling them off. (No scratch repo created — the setting's behavior is documented + the field's settability confirmed on the live repo.) Folded into ADR 0037 as the rejected alternative.
